title: Reactions to Apple's new vision
description: Mike McQuaid from Homebrew discusses Apple's Vision Pro announcement at WWDC 2023, covering the device's technical specs, comfort concerns, battery limitations, $3,500 price point, and comparisons to Meta's Quest devices.
